page_title: "Splunk Observability Cloud: signalfx_automated_archival_exempt_metric"
description: |-
  Manages metrics exempted from automated archival in Splunk Observability Cloud.
---

# Resource: signalfx_automated_archival_exempt_metric

Manages a replacement-only group of metrics that remain available when automated archival is enabled.

## Example

```terraform
resource "signalfx_automated_archival_exempt_metric" "example" {
  exempt_metrics {
    name = "service.request.count"
  }

  exempt_metrics {
    name = "service.request.duration"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `exempt_metrics` (Block List) Ordered metrics to exempt from automated archival. Changing this list replaces the resource. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--exempt_metrics))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier for the resource.

<a id="nestedblock--exempt_metrics"></a>
### Nested Schema for `exempt_metrics`

Required:

- `name` (String) Name of the metric to exempt from automated archival.

Read-Only:

- `created` (Number) Creation timestamp returned by Splunk Observability Cloud.
- `creator` (String) ID of the user who created the exempt metric.
- `last_updated` (Number) Most recent update timestamp returned by Splunk Observability Cloud.
- `last_updated_by` (String) ID of the user who most recently updated the exempt metric.
